body:
Hi Mandla,

Thanks again for coming on the show - the music feature landed really well with listeners. I'll send over the clip once Naledi has cut it. Would love to have you back for the 30th anniversary documentary.

- Asha
subject: Re: Thank you for the interview

body: Zinhle — thank you for the taxi-rank nomination. I'd like to visit Bree Street with you next Wednesday morning if you can spare an hour.
subject: Re: Voices of the City nomination — follow-up

body: K — one more note on the pilot: bring the room mic up 2dB at the interview cut. Everything else is landing.
subject: Re: Off-Mic pilot listen

body: Nomsa — thank you for the intro to Kwela. I'll send the current outline this week. Deadline is Dec 31.
subject: Re: Book proposal — publisher intro

body: Mamá — Sunday: (1) blood pressure readings, (2) Marco's asado headcount, (3) sancocho recipe you promised me.
subject: Draft: Sunday-call agenda for Mom

body: Lindiwe — proposing mid-cohort one-on-ones with each mentee week of 12 March. 30 min slots via Calendly.
subject: Draft: JMU cohort — mid-cohort check-in
